message:
feat(session): production-grade V2 session store with chain hashing, checkpoints, and migration

Expand the V2 segmented session store from a basic append-only prototype
to a production-ready storage layer with integrity guarantees and O(index)
resume performance.

Session store V2 additions:
- Running SHA-256 chain hash (H(prev || payload_sha256)) maintained across
  appends for tamper detection and integrity verification
- Checkpoint system: create_checkpoint() snapshots head position and chain
  hash; rollback_to_checkpoint() truncates segments/index to restore state
  with post-rollback integrity verification
- Manifest generation: write_manifest() computes comprehensive store
  metadata including entry/message/branch counts, integrity hashes (chain
  hash, manifest hash, last CRC32C), and structural invariant assertions
  (parent links closed, monotonic sequences, hash chain valid)
- Migration ledger: append_migration_event()/read_migration_events() track
  all migration and rollback operations with correlation IDs
- Seek-read operations: lookup_entry(), read_entries_from(),
  read_all_entries(), read_tail_entries(), read_active_path() (follows
  parent links from leaf to root)
- Index rebuild: rebuild_index() re-scans all segments to reconstruct
  the offset index from scratch as a recovery path
- Bridge functions: frame_to_session_entry() and
  session_entry_to_frame_args() for SessionEntry <-> V2 frame conversion;
  v2_sidecar_path() and has_v2_sidecar() for sidecar store location

Session integration:
- V2OpenMode enum (Full, ActivePath, Tail(u64)) for controlling read scope
- Session::open() now checks for V2 sidecar before JSONL fallback
- Session::open_from_v2() and create_v2_sidecar_from_jsonl() for
  migration from JSONL to V2 segmented format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
